meaning: adj.(美国的)罗克西影院联号的
examples: Capital Idea should therefore invest in the Roxy Playhouse, the Slice-o'-Pizza, and the Divot Golf Club, three new businesses in the Irongate district.
In New York, a dog named Roxy was missing for months.
Thanks to her microchip, Roxy was soon returned to her grateful owner.
After thanking all the predictables, he paused and directed a heart-to-heart to his daughter, Roxy.
But classic tracks from Roxy Music, T Rex and Iggy Pop did make it into the film.
